description: R3a-4 dep-artifact payload + consumer-hook vectors. Covers: (1) intraAppCallEdge dedup (from|to first-wins), (2) freshness-stamp barrier (stale/fresh cases), (3) injection (intraAppCallEdge → synthetic typedEdge, both-ends-in-model guard). Hand-authored invariants were asserted against live pipeline output before emit.

vectors.name: cross-app-dep-hooks
vectors.description: Full R3a-4 fixture projection — the chain dep (includesSource:true, DoIt→DoWrite→Insert). Counts for round-trip verification in the contract test.

edgeDedupVector.name: intra_app_call_edge_dedup
edgeDedupVector.description: A source-bearing dep codeunit DoIt() calls DoWrite() twice (two call sites). The intraAppCallEdges projection deduplicates by from|to (first-wins), yielding ONE edge for the DoIt→DoWrite pair, not two. The callsiteId is from the first occurrence.
invariants: no two edges share the same (from, to) — dedup invariant

freshnessVector.name: freshness_stamp_barrier
freshnessVector.description: The freshness-stamp barrier: isDepOrderIndexStampFresh returns true when all fields match (appId, version, sourceContentHash, orderIndexSchemaVersion), and false for any mismatch. Special case: empty packageSemanticHash is conservatively fresh (orchestrator not yet filled).
invariants: empty packageSemanticHash → conservatively fresh: expected fresh=true

injectionVector.name: injection_intra_app_call_edge
injectionVector.description: injectIntraAppCallEdges converts each intraAppCallEdge (whose both ends are present in the merged model) into a synthetic direct-call typedEdge. The callsiteId is the stored real callsiteId from the dep artifact (populated for source-parsed artifacts). An edge whose ends are absent from the model is silently skipped.
invariants: ≥1 intraAppCallEdge with both ends in model
injected edge count equals intraAppCallEdges with both ends in model
